rejected_candidates.reason: The old [x,7x mod 256] pair is not a plain affine duplicate. Replacing the second lane by zero loses the modulo code needed by the final color decoder.
Emptying unused Split output ca0 passes the checker but ORT exits -11; this is not a standard safe optional output.
